recommended_approach.summary: Define SpawnAdapter as standalone interface in server/platform/spawn-adapter.ts, implement ClaudeCodeSpawnAdapter in server/platform/claude-code-spawn.ts, create scripts/spawn-agent.ts as universal CLI entry point, build scripts/personality-compiler.ts, then refactor all spawn callsites.

files_to_create.description: SpawnAdapter interface. SpawnConfig = { agentId?, prompt, cwd, model?, skipPermissions?, sessionPersistence?, outputPath?, env? }. SpawnHandle = { pid, promise? }. SpawnMode enum: 'tracked' vs 'detached'. agentId optional — foreman spawns directives without --agent.

ClaudeCodeSpawnAdapter. Encapsulates spawn('claude', ['-p', '--agent', agentId, ...]). Detached mode: stdio redirect to log, child.unref(). Tracked mode: promise resolves on exit. Validates agentId against agent-registry.json.
CLI: spawn-agent.ts --agent <id> --prompt <text> --mode tracked|detached [--model sonnet]. Reads gruai.config.json for platform, instantiates adapter, calls spawn(). Executable via tsx.
Reads agent-registry.json + .claude/agents/*.md. For Claude Code: no-op. For Codex: writes codex.md with flattened personality. Pure function: compilePersonality(agentId, platform): string.

files_to_modify.changes: Replace spawn('claude',...) at line 364 with ClaudeCodeSpawnAdapter.spawn() in detached mode. launchDirective shrinks to ~10 lines.
Replace spawn template at line 339 with tsx scripts/spawn-agent.ts invocation. Keep CHILD_PIDS + trap pattern.
Add spawn-agent.ts cleanup pattern alongside existing claude patterns.

key_decisions: SpawnAdapter SEPARATE from PlatformAdapter — orthogonal concerns
Two spawn modes (tracked vs detached) in one interface via SpawnConfig.mode
spawn-agent.ts is CLI script, not library — pipeline docs need bash commands
Personality compiler called on-demand by spawn-agent.ts, not pre-computed
foreman.ts agentId is null for directive spawns — SpawnAdapter handles gracefully

deferred: scripts/scheduled-runs.sh (2 simple shell spawns — adapter adds no value)
scope_assessment.verdict: Plan scope correct. No expansion needed.

recommended_approach.summary: Implement CodexCLISpawnAdapter, proof script that validates adapter without requiring Codex installed, capability gap documentation.

files_to_create.description: CodexCLISpawnAdapter. Maps to spawn('codex', ['-q', prompt]). Writes codex.md before spawn. No --agent equivalent.
Proof script: compile personality, attempt spawn (catch ENOENT if no codex), output structured JSON report.
Gap table: Feature | Claude Code | Codex CLI | Gap Impact

key_decisions: Proof works without Codex installed — validates adapter logic, not Codex itself
codex.md written per-spawn to avoid parallel collision
Gap doc is a formal deliverable for Wave 3 planning

follow_ups.action: Backlog: update mcp directive tool command string
Verify tsx available in all spawn contexts
Update validate-gate.sh if new artifacts produced
